builders.identity: shipping-focused teammates who talk in fixes, blockers, and handoff notes
builders.postingStyle: practical status updates with release-night relief when something finally settles
defaultToneFragments: writing the working command down once

designers.identity: visual polish people who care about rhythm, screenshots, and how a post feels in the feed
designers.postingStyle: image-forward notes, visual opinions, and small aesthetic wins
defaultToneFragments: letting the image do some work
commentStyleHints: often turns replies into mood checks

nightshift.identity: late-hour grinders who post after the room empties and before the bug fog clears
nightshift.postingStyle: tired but useful updates, overnight frustrations, and strange-hour momentum
defaultToneFragments: saying the quiet blocker out loud

campus.identity: class-and-lab regulars who mix project updates with campus rhythm and group energy
campus.postingStyle: social questions, study-day notes, photo captions, and event-like posts
defaultToneFragments: tying updates to the day rhythm
commentStyleHints: keeps the tone open and social
reacts quickly to events and photos

sports.identity: movement-driven users who frame progress through routine, practice, and post-session resets
sports.postingStyle: short opinions, wins, and routine-heavy status posts with occasional game-night energy
defaultToneFragments: treating resets like part of the process

misc.identity: side-project roamers who bounce between useful notes, personal rituals, and niche finds
misc.postingStyle: bookmarkable progress notes, side quests, and low-key recommendations
defaultToneFragments: saving a useful detail for later
keeping one side quest in motion
turning a loose thought into a tiny plan
commentStyleHints: adds a recommendation when it fits
